ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein sequence */,
  "protein_accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the protein sequence */,
  "protein_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  "crc64" TEXT /* CRC64 value of the protein sequence */,
  "protein_sequence" TEXT /* The actual amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "source_database" TEXT /* The database from which the protein sequence was obtained */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* The date the protein sequence was added to the database */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The date the protein sequence was last updated */,
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to link the protein to its taxonomy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_taxonomy_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxonomy_id") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_accession" TEXT /* Accession number of the method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., IQ, Myosin_head) */,
  "method_database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database used for the method (e.g., Pfam, PROSITE profiles) */,
  "method_version" TEXT /* The version of the method */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the method */,
  "method_reference" TEXT /* A reference to a publication or documentation about the method */,
  "method_type" TEXT /* The type of method (e.g., Pfam, PROSITE profiles, PRINTS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy" (
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomy entry */,
  "taxonomy_science_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism (e.g., Xenopus laevis) */,
  "taxonomy_full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the organism (e.g., Xenopus laevis (African clawed frog)) */,
  "taxonomy_lineage" TEXT /* The full taxonomic lineage of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* The common name of the organism */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* The kingdom to which the organism belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "binding_sites" (
  "binding_site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each binding site */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence the binding site belongs to */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to detect the binding site */,
  "pos_from" INTEGER /* Starting position of the binding site */,
  "pos_to" INTEGER /* Ending position of the binding site */,
  "match_score" REAL /* Score of the match */,
  "binding_site_type" TEXT /* The type of binding site (e.g., IQ motif, EF-hand) */,
  "binding_site_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the binding site */,
  "binding_site_source" TEXT /* The source of the binding site data (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("binding_site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_sites_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_binding_sites_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence the domain belongs to */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to detect the domain */,
  "pos_from" INTEGER /* Starting position of the domain */,
  "pos_to" INTEGER /* Ending position of the domain */,
  "match_score" REAL /* Score of the match */,
  "domain_type" TEXT /* The type of domain (e.g., Myosin head) */,
  "domain_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the domain */,
  "domain_source" TEXT /* The source of the domain data (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_domains_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "entry_short_name" TEXT /* Short name of the entry (e.g., IQ_motif_EF-hand-BS) */,
  "entry_name" TEXT /* Full name of the entry (e.g., IQ motif, EF-hand binding site) */,
  "entry_type" TEXT /* Type of the entry (e.g., Binding_site, Domain) */,
  "entry_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the entry */,
  "entry_source" TEXT /* The source of the entry data (e.g., experimental, computational) */,
  "entry_reference" TEXT /* A reference to a publication or documentation about the entry */,
  "entry_status" TEXT /* The status of the entry (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_fragments" (
  "fragment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fragment */,
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protein sequence the fragment belongs to */,
  "fragment_type" TEXT /* Type of the fragment (e.g., N, C) */,
  "fragment_start_position" INTEGER /* The starting position of the fragment in the protein sequence */,
  "fragment_end_position" INTEGER /* The ending position of the fragment in the protein sequence */,
  "fragment_sequence" TEXT /* The amino acid sequence of the fragment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fragment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_fragments_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("protein_id")
)
